perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long black hair, wearing a black dress with white collar details, is inside a Costco warehouse. She stands in front of a wall of stacked boxes, holding a large box of 'Shuang-La V' crackers and gesturing towards it while speaking with an enthusiastic expression. (2) A transition shows a close-up of a store price tag for the 'Kenji' crackers priced at $289. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor setting where the same woman and another woman wearing a blue beret are seated at a table. They hold a smaller retail bag of the crackers, eat them, and use expressive hand gestures—like a waving motion near the mouth—to describe the spicy and numbing sensation. They smile and pose with peace signs towards the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop music begins immediately. A female voice speaks in a fast, energetic, and high-pitched tone, introducing a product. Background ambient noise is suppressed. (2) The music continues as a second female voice joins in. The two voices engage in a lively, synchronized conversation about the flavor and texture of the snack. Sharp 'pop' and 'ding' sound effects are heard intermittently, coinciding with text transitions. (3) The upbeat music maintains its pace until the very end, concluding with a final enthusiastic verbal recommendation.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '辣妹拿什麼' (What is the hot girl holding?) - Hook text with a questioning tone. (2) '爽辣V 青花椒餅乾' (Shuang-La V Green Sichuan Pepper Crackers) - Functional text identifying the product. (3) '討論度爆高 停不下來!' (Extremely high discussion, can't stop!) - Decorative hook text for excitement. (4) '喜年來 新品爽辣' (Kenji New Product Shuang-La) - Functional text identifying the brand and line. (5) '289元 一大箱' ($289 for a large box) - Functional price information. (6) '5月話題度最高的餅乾' (Highest discussion cracker in May) - Hook text establishing trendiness. (7) '鹹甜鹹甜的' (Salty and sweet) - Descriptive text about taste. (8) '老少咸宜' (Suitable for all ages) - Hook text for target audience. (9) '一箱有20包 一包是15塊' (20 packs per box, 15 dollars each) - Functional value breakdown.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at store -> Price reveal -> Detailed review and tasting at home

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main character in store; 2 female characters together in the indoor segment.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long straight black hair and wears a black dress with white trim; the other has long dark hair and wears a blue beret and a white top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First scene features industrial warehouse shelving units filled with bulk food items. Second scene features a clean, brightly lit domestic interior with a grey table and a refrigerator in the background.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Intro -> Price Context -> Experience Demo -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional product review intended to drive sales and awareness for 'Kenji' Green Sichuan Pepper crackers at Costco. It leverages the influencer's discovery at the store and a subsequent tasting session to prove the product's value and unique flavor profile.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses exclusively on the Kenji brand snack, repeatedly mentions its price, value, and availability at Costco, and provides a highly positive, detailed review.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density variety-show style text overlays and fast-paced 'talking head' style reviews.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The content uses a 'hot girl' curiosity hook to introduce a bulk-buy snack review, targeting shoppers looking for trending items at Costco Taiwan.
